zh.Culford, Saint Edmundsbury, Suffolk, Eng: 英國英格蘭素福爾可爾福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Susanah Browne於1579年10月25日出生在英國時，她的父親Edmund Browne24歲，母親Elleyne Crumm34歲。她於1603年6月與Francis Warde在英國諾福爾可費爾比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國諾福爾可彤絲朵。

zh-hans.Culford, Saint Edmundsbury, Suffolk, Eng: 英国英格兰素福爾可爾福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susanah Browne于1579年10月25日出生在英国时，她的父亲Edmund Browne24岁，母亲Elleyne Crumm34岁。她于1603年6月与Francis Warde在英国諾福爾可費爾比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国諾福爾可彤絲朵。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: Susanah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Susanna  , in  2003  the most common in this group of names. It is the form of the name used in the Old Testament. The tale of Susannah, wife of  Joachim , and the elders who falsely accused her of adultery, is to be found in the apocryphal book that bears her name, and was popular in the Middle Ages and later.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Susanah Browne was born on 25 October 1579, in England, her father, Edmund Browne, was 24 and her mother, Elleyne Crumm, was 34. She married Francis Warde in June 1603, in Filby, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She was buried in Tunstall, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susanah Browne est née le 25 octobre 1579, à Angleterre, son père, Edmund Browne, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elleyne Crumm, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Francis Warde en juin 1603, à Filby, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elleenterrée à Tunstall, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Susanah Browne am 25. Oktober 1579 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Browne 24 und ihre Mutter Elleyne Crumm 34. Sie hat im Juni 1603 in Filby, Norfolk, England Francis Warde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie wurde in Tunstall, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Susanah Browne è nata il il 25 ottobre 1579 nel England, sua padre, Edmund Browne, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Elleyne Crumm, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Francis Warde nel giugno 1603, nel Filby, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Fu sepolta a Tunstall, Norfolk, England.

ja.Culford, Saint Edmundsbury, Suffolk, Eng: イギリスイギリススフォルククウルフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Susanah Browneが1579年10月25日にイギリスで生まれた時，父Edmund Browneは24歳，母Elleyne Crummは34歳であった。1603年6月にイギリスノーフォルクフィルビーでFrancis Wardeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスノーフォルクトゥンスタルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Susanah Browne(이)가 1579년 10월 25일 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Browne(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elleyne Crumm(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1603년 6월 영국 노르폴크 피비에서 Francis Warde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 노르폴크 툰스탤에 묻혔다.

pt.25 October 1579–23 January 1620/1: 25 de outubro de 1579–23 de janeiro de 1621
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susanah Browne nasceu em 25 de outubro de 1579, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Browne, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elleyne Crumm, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Francis Warde em junho de 1603, em Filby, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela foi sepultada em Tunstall, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susanah Browne родилась 25 октября 1579 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund Browne было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elleyne Crumm, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Francis Warde июнь 1603 г. в местности филби, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она была похоронена в местности тунсталл, норфолк, Англия.

es.25 October 1579–23 January 1620/1: 25 de octubre de 1579–23 de enero de 1621
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Susanah Browne nació el 25 de octubre de 1579, en Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Browne, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elleyne Crumm, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Francis Warde en junio de 1603, en Filby, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Fue sepultada en Tunstall, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
